recommendations.title: Fresh
recommendations.overview: Frustrated by scrolling dating apps only to end up on lame, tedious dates, Noa takes a chance by giving her number to the awkwardly charming Steve after a produce-section meet-cute at the grocery store.

recommendations.title: The Promotion
recommendations.overview: Two assistant managers of a corporate grocery store vie for a coveted promotion.

recommendations.title: The Mist
recommendations.overview: After a violent storm, a dense cloud of mist envelops a small Maine town, trapping David Drayton and his five-year-old son in a local grocery store with other local residents. They soon discover that the mist conceals deadly horrors that threaten the

recommendations.title: Black Friday
recommendations.overview: A group of toy store employees must protect each other from a horde of parasite infected shoppers.

recommendations.title: Patrick
recommendations.overview: Patrick lays comatose in a small private hospital, his only action being his involuntary spitting. When a pretty young nurse, just separated from her husband, begins work at the hospital, she senses that Patrick is communicating with her, and he seem

recommendations.title: Phase IV
recommendations.overview: Arizona ants mock the food chain on their way to a desert lab to get two scientists and a woman.

recommendations.title: Foodfight!
recommendations.overview: The evil Brand X joins a supermarket that becomes a city after closing time.

recommendations.title: Liquid Sky
recommendations.overview: An alien creature invades New York's punk subculture in its search for an opiate released by the brain during an orgasm.

recommendations.title: Empire Records
recommendations.overview: The employees of an independent music store learn about each other as they try to stop the store from being absorbed by a large chain.

recommendations.title: Time Cut
recommendations.overview: A teen in 2024 accidentally time-travels to 2003, days before a masked killer murders her sister. Can she change the past without destroying the future?
